note: Maps the placeholder rule id `example.finops.stop-idle-dev` to the shipped medium-severity `compute.vm.idle-detected`. Props are tuned so ONLY idle-detected fires: cpu_p95_percent=2 and network_p95_bytes=100 clear the idle thresholds; memory_p95_percent=50 keeps compute.vm.low-utilization satisfied (it needs BOTH cpu AND memory low); identity_type=SystemAssigned satisfies compute.vm.managed-identity.assigned; and the environment tag satisfies compute.vm.environment-tag.required. No risk-gate wired, so the T0 match opens a shadow PR (guard.should_execute=true), matching the frozen scenario. The remediation ActionType is remediate.remove-orphan-resource (same as the unattached-public-ip overlay).
